# Notes API with Authentication

A RESTful API built with Node.js, Express, and MongoDB featuring user authentication and user-specific data management.

## Features

- ✅ User registration with encrypted passwords (bcrypt)
- ✅ User login with JWT token generation
- ✅ Protected routes requiring authentication
- ✅ User-specific notes (each user can only access their own data)
- ✅ Complete CRUD operations for notes
- ✅ MongoDB database integration

## Tech Stack

- **Runtime:** Node.js
- **Framework:** Express.js
- **Database:** MongoDB
- **Authentication:** JWT (JSON Web Tokens)
- **Password Encryption:** bcrypt
- **ODM:** Mongoose

## API Endpoints

### Authentication

**Register User**
```
POST /register
Body: { "username": "string", "email": "string", "password": "string" }
```

**Login User**
```
POST /login
Body: { "email": "string", "password": "string" }
Returns: { "token": "jwt_token", "username": "string" }
```

### Notes (Protected Routes - Require JWT Token)

**Get All Notes**
```
GET /notes
Headers: { "authorization": "your_jwt_token" }
```

**Create Note**
```
POST /notes
Headers: { "authorization": "your_jwt_token" }
Body: { "text": "string" }
```

**Get Single Note**
```
GET /notes/:id
Headers: { "authorization": "your_jwt_token" }
```

**Delete Note**
```
DELETE /notes/:id
Headers: { "authorization": "your_jwt_token" }
```

## Installation & Setup

1. **Clone the repository**
```bash
git clone <your-repo-url>
cd <project-folder>
```

2. **Install dependencies**
```bash
npm install
```

3. **Start MongoDB**
- Ensure MongoDB is running on your local machine
- Default connection: `mongodb://localhost:27017/notesdb`

4. **Run the server**
```bash
node notes-api-db.js
```

Server will start on `http://localhost:3000`

## Dependencies
```json
{
  "express": "^4.x.x",
  "mongoose": "^8.x.x",
  "bcrypt": "^5.x.x",
  "jsonwebtoken": "^9.x.x"
}
```

## Security Features

- Passwords are hashed using bcrypt before storage
- JWT tokens expire after 1 hour
- Protected routes verify token validity
- User data is isolated (users can only access their own notes)

## Project Structure
```
├── models/
│   ├── Note.js          # Note schema
│   └── User.js          # User schema
├── notes-api-db.js      # Main server file
├── package.json
└── README.md
```

## Learning Outcomes

This project demonstrates understanding of:
- RESTful API design
- User authentication and authorization
- Database integration and relationships
- Secure password handling
- JWT-based session management
- MongoDB schema design
- Express middleware
